name: Self-Improving AI Coding Agents Through Accumulated Behavioral Rules: A Closed-Loop Framework
summary: arXiv:2607.13091v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM-based coding agents repeat the same classes of mistakes across sessions because they lack a mechanism to retain corrections from human review f...
description: arXiv:2607.13091v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM-based coding agents repeat the same classes of mistakes across sessions because they lack a mechanism to retain corrections from human review feedback. We present a closed-loop framework in which every accepted review comment is codified as a persistent behavioral rule, progressively expanding the set of error classes the agent can self-dete...
author: Aditya Aggarwal, Nahid Farhady Ghalaty
